---
name: Content change
about: Suggest additions or corrections to lexical content and packs
title: "[Content] "
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

## Language

Which language is affected?

## Pack Or Source Area

Which source pack, runtime pack, or entry group is affected?

## Requested Change

Describe the new entry, correction, or editorial adjustment.

## Why

Explain the linguistic or editorial reason for the change.

## Suggested Data

If possible, include:

- concept
- target lexeme
- gloss or translation
- level
- part of speech
- example sentence
- notes about register, morphology, or ambiguity
